initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT read_log.url, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM read_log
JOIN read_log AS prev1 ON read_log.session = prev1.session AND read_log.stamp > prev1.stamp
JOIN read_log AS prev2 ON prev1.session = prev2.session AND prev1.stamp > prev2.stamp
WHERE prev2.url = '/detail'
  AND prev1.url = '/detail'
  AND read_log.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY read_log.url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT 
    r3.url AS third_page_visit,
    COUNT(*) AS occurrence_count
FROM 
    read_log r1
JOIN 
    read_log r2 
    ON r1.session = r2.session 
    AND r2.stamp > r1.stamp
JOIN 
    read_log r3 
    ON r2.session = r3.session 
    AND r3.stamp > r2.stamp
WHERE 
    r1.url = '/detail'
    AND r2.url = '/detail'
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 
        FROM read_log r4 
        WHERE r4.session = r1.session 
          AND r4.stamp > r2.stamp 
          AND r4.stamp < r3.stamp
    )
GROUP BY 
    r3.url
ORDER BY 
    occurrence_count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT read_log.url, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM read_log
WHERE read_log.url IN (
    SELECT r3.url
    FROM read_log r1
    JOIN read_log r2 ON r1.session = r2.session AND r2.stamp > r1.stamp
    JOIN read_log r3 ON r2.session = r3.session AND r3.stamp > r2.stamp
    WHERE r1.url = '/detail'
      AND r2.url = '/detail'
      AND r3.url != '/detail'
)
GROUP BY read_log.url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 3;

SELECT read_log.url, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM read_log
WHERE read_log.session IN (
    SELECT session
    FROM read_log
    WHERE url = '/detail'
    GROUP BY session
    HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN url = '/detail' THEN 1 END) >= 2
)
AND read_log.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY read_log.url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 3;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT read_log.url, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM read_log
WHERE read_log.session IN (
    SELECT session
    FROM read_log
    WHERE url = '/detail'
    GROUP BY session
    HAVING COUNT(CASE WHEN url = '/detail' THEN 1 END) >= 2
)
AND read_log.url != '/detail'
GROUP BY read_log.url
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 3;
